ncl:ebb7876dc7dad0aa.title: News: HSL Review pathology test results look-up system goes live
ncl:ebb7876dc7dad0aa.description: Supporting improved clinical decision-making by bringing together results from Royal Free, Barnet, Chase Farm, North Middlesex University Hospital, Whittington Health and University College London Hospitals sites into a single, easy-to-navigate interface.

ncl:7d44f8d5ae790eb7.title: Service: Adult Hospital at Home: NMUH
ncl:7d44f8d5ae790eb7.description: Service update: NMUH's Adult Hospital at Home accepts direct GP referrals, providing acute care for adults in their usual residence, preventing unnecessary hospital admissions.

ncl:ec7751a7d79e0bd0.title: Page: Urgent suspected cancer: Indicative wait for first appointment data
ncl:ec7751a7d79e0bd0.description: Continued capacity constraints across north central London are leading to longer waits for patients following urgent suspected cancer first appointments (previously known as 2WW). See the latest data.

ncl:13c6f12d4057ab28.title: News: Finchley Memorial CDC update: Temporary pause on cardiology referrals (24-hour tape & echocardiograms)
ncl:13c6f12d4057ab28.description: The tests will be reintroduced for GP direct access via choose and book from 1 April 2026, once the current patient backlog has been cleared.

ncl:f367e219aca303c1.title: News: Lab introduces more accurate cholesterol measurements
ncl:f367e219aca303c1.description: Changed methodology at Health Services Laboratories (HSL) has enabled more accurate reporting of LDL-cholesterol (LDL-C) in patients with serum triglycerides up to 9.0 mmol/L.

ncl:622cad0abc361d4c.title: News: Update to recall of several Nestle® SMA® specialist and standard infant formula
ncl:622cad0abc361d4c.description: The UK Health Security Agency has issued updated briefing notes on the infant and follow-on formula recall due to possible cereulide toxin contamination. These should be read in conjunction with the previous notes.

ncl:4829140b1ac94f94.title: News: Update: Which container to use for faecal calprotectin tests
ncl:4829140b1ac94f94.description: See which container to use when. Samples collected in the incorrect container will be rejected and not processed, causing delays.

ncl:2f73361c1daacdf2.title: News: Medicines Supply Notification: Phenobarbital 30mg and 60mg tablets
ncl:2f73361c1daacdf2.description: Phenobarbital tablets are in short supply, with resupply expected at the end of March 2026. Prescribers are advised not to start new patients on these medications. Read more

nhs:3385b994b054a7ba.title: Patients handed over quicker despite 5-year high in number taken to hospital
nhs:3385b994b054a7ba.description: Ambulance crews and A&E staff have slashed handover delays by more than 7 minutes this winter – even as they ferried the highest number of patients to hospital in half a decade. Figures out today show that more than 1.2million patients were handed over (1,234,731) to A&Es by ambulances so far this winter. This is […]

nhs:556a6b8586933b20.title: Women attending first NHS mammogram hits 10-year high as thousands more cancers found
nhs:556a6b8586933b20.description: Hundreds of thousands more women attended NHS breast screening last year and thousands more cancers were diagnosed early in England. New figures today show that in 2024/25, 1.94 million women aged 50 to 70 attended screening within six months of invitation – up nearly 200,000 (193,745) from 1.75 million the previous year. As a result, […]

nhs:45e2227fbc5c5969.title: NHS facing ‘second surge’ in vomiting virus as cases reach highest level this winter
nhs:45e2227fbc5c5969.description: The NHS could be facing a “second surge” in norovirus as the vomiting bug reaches its highest level so far this winter. Figures published today show the average number of patients in hospital with norovirus each day this week rose to over 1,000 for the first time this winter (1,012). The total is a jump […]

nhs:7e7798edd70f3c38.title: “NHS talking therapies completely changed my life”: NHS launches major campaign to support millions more people with anxiety
nhs:7e7798edd70f3c38.description: Millions of adults facing debilitating anxiety conditions are missing out on treatment that could help them recover and get back on with their lives the NHS has said, as it launches a major new mental health campaign. New analysis of NHS data shows that over 670,000 people were treated with NHS talking therapy care last […]

nhs:5dc3d83374593b03.title: Thousands recruited for “new era” severe mental illness study
nhs:5dc3d83374593b03.description: Thousands of people living with schizophrenia and severe depression are being recruited by the NHS for a major new study which could unlock a “new era” of personalised treatment for severe mental illness. As part of the world’s largest mental health study, researchers will analyse the DNA of thousands of people alongside detailed questionnaires to […]

nhs:86e142aa1bc715f3.title: NHS waiting list lowest in almost 3 years as NHS battled busiest winter on record
nhs:86e142aa1bc715f3.description: The NHS delivered more elective activity in 2025 than any other year in its history, helping cut the waiting list to its lowest level since February 2023. Staff delivered a historic high of 18.4 million treatments and operations in 2025, up from 18 million in 2024, as the waiting list dropped to 7.29 million. Today’s […]

nhs:e5334b333ef4439d.title: Early NHS preparation ‘paying off’ amid shorter ambulance handover times
nhs:e5334b333ef4439d.description: Ambulances handed over patients more than 2 minutes faster last month despite facing their busiest January since before COVID-19. Provisional figures out today show there were 420,324 ambulances handovers with known times in January, the highest number for the month since 2020 and a 5.2% increase compared to 399,415 in January last year. Despite this, […]

nhs:725e5add6fa05488.title: NHS services tackling winter head on
nhs:725e5add6fa05488.description: Ambulances unloaded patients three minutes faster last week, even as A&Es saw more ambulance handovers than any point last winter. Figures released today show there were 94,551 ambulance handovers last week – higher than the busiest week last year (94,493 w/e 29 December 2024), and up almost 1,000 on the week previous and over 3,250 […]

ncl:aca3b55c717a5c75.title: News: GP Webinar summary: 26 February 2026
ncl:aca3b55c717a5c75.description: Find a summary of recent meetings at any time by putting 'GP webinar' into the NCL General Practice Website's search bar.

ncl:b8a0f8ed4e800243.title: News: RFL releases guidance on ultrasound clinical vetting
ncl:b8a0f8ed4e800243.description: Royal Free London (RFL) has updated its ultrasound vetting guidance in line with NCL vetting guidelines. The trust will only be able to conduct ultrasound examinations that meet specific criteria.

ncl:ea098adae90b1e89.title: News: Support London-wide campaign to reduce medicine waste
ncl:ea098adae90b1e89.description: Resources for practices and pharmacies to use to encourage patients to only order the right quantity of medicines for their needs to help cut waste and prevent shortages.

ncl:1fe6789d9551273f.title: News: EMIS Global update: 23-27 February 2026
ncl:1fe6789d9551273f.description: See what's new in EMIS Global

ncl:0f542d9be7fc9a8b.title: Event: NCL Education Faculty Facilitation Skills Workshop
ncl:0f542d9be7fc9a8b.description: This in-person workshop is free to attend for all Primary Care roles who lead, or are preparing to lead, small teams within and across organisations and neighbourhoods. Starts at 2.30pm on Thursday 23 April.

ncl:35bef5d5a8a657d6.title: On Demand Training: Suicide Awareness and Response e-learning for Primary Care
ncl:35bef5d5a8a657d6.description: The e-learning on suicide awareness and the use of the Suicide Assessment Framework e-Tool (SAFETool) is designed to equip clinical primary care staff with an understanding of their role in suicide prevention.

ncl:06252f824df806dc.title: News: New GP Feedback & Alert system to replace Quality Alerts from 9 March
ncl:06252f824df806dc.description: A single route for GPs to raise concerns with providers is being launched, replacing all Quality Alerts and GP liaison clinical emails. Find the new GP Feedback & Alert form in your NCL Global folder in EMIS.

ncl:7a5b9b4aa8a47c80.title: Event: Mild Traumatic Brain Injury: A practical update on assessment and management
ncl:7a5b9b4aa8a47c80.description: This one hour session will provide an update on the assessment and management of mild traumatic brain injury (TBI), featuring insights on neuroimaging and recovery promotion. Join at 6pm on Monday 23 March.

ncl:fc5fc2bba064e12a.title: News: Digital pre-invites for bowel cancer screening
ncl:fc5fc2bba064e12a.description: The NHS Bowel Screening Programme in London has started to send invites via the NHS App. Help patients stay up to date by downloading the NHS App and turning on notifications for timely screening reminders.

ncl:e050166aeac72df4.title: News: NHS App Ambassadors: Leading transformation in patient access
ncl:e050166aeac72df4.description: Read how Brunswick Park Medical Practice improved patient access to repeat prescriptions by implementing a patient-centred digital system through the NHS App.

ncl:d79d271b97a16c10.title: Event: UCLH Gastrointestinal (GI) Physiology Education Day
ncl:d79d271b97a16c10.description:
This one-day gastrointestinal study day aims to share knowledge and understanding of the complex gastrointestinal system and teach
practical ways to enhance patient care. From 8.30am on Tuesday 5 May.

ncl:37fe236aba8c8038.title: News: EMIS Global update: 2-6 March 2026
ncl:37fe236aba8c8038.description: See what's new in EMIS Global

ncl:3519bb4c41d92c11.title: News: Mount Vernon Cancer Centre proposals: Share your views
ncl:3519bb4c41d92c11.description: Healthcare professionals are invited to share their views by completing the online questionnaire or join one of the targeted workshops exploring the proposed changes and what they could mean for the patient pathway.

ncl:9d99303af8cb86fc.title: Event: Physical Activity Clinical Champion Training
ncl:9d99303af8cb86fc.description: Join this introduction session to lean how brief physical activity conversations can be integrated into everyday clinical practice to improve patient outcomes. Starting at 12.30pm on Wednesday 25 March.

ncl:0b2899fdbc7e8763.title: News: Wood Green CDC announces temporary lift closure
ncl:0b2899fdbc7e8763.description: The Wood Green Community Diagnostic Centre lift will be unavailable for the rest of the week. Please inform patients who require a lift of this temporary service change, and encourage them to postpone their blood test or book at alternative services.

artp:395eeebe5daa45de.title: New Artp Standard Appointment Of Consultant Clinical Scientists In Respiratory Sleep Science

artp:783dd1caa2197070.title: Free Artp Membership For Those On The Spirometry Register

artp:a3ef6fa2c3ab6bdc.title: Opportunity For Artpregistered Professionals In Spirometry Reporting

artp:e28e46110208fe0e.title: New Artp Standard Respiratory And Sleep Physiology Diagnostic Reporting

artp:aa9d50af0a698e38.title: Dscount On Spirometry Webinars For Artp

artp:a4bbe604a50ef028.title: Artp Spirometry Position On Gli Global Predicted Equations

artp:a9f9025d0fa250a9.title: Artp Professional Examinations Train The Trainer Webinar 2025

artp:e8c00ecd048ee462.title: Taskforce For Lung Health Annual Report

artp:11e9e9c31ee9da16.title: Artp Spirometry Train The Trainer Webinar 2025

artp:1e9af78ccc9fb86a.title: Position Statement On Raceneutral Spirometry Reference Equations June 2025

artp:d3bf747bba20ee1c.title: Temporary Pause Of Artp Spirometry Certificate Enrolments May 2026

ncl:f555641b2dfb5a16.title: News: GP Webinar summary: 12 March 2026
ncl:f555641b2dfb5a16.description: Find a summary of recent meetings at any time by putting 'GP webinar' into the NCL General Practice Website's search bar.

ncl:4ced67998e6687ff.title: News: Prostate Cancer Awareness Month: Offer testing to high-risk groups
ncl:4ced67998e6687ff.description: GPs are reminded to offer a prostate-specific antigen (PSA) test and initiating a brief discussion with patients at high-risk of prostate cancer to support early diagnosis.

ncl:b2d9702923965402.title: News: EMIS Global update: 9-13 March 2026
ncl:b2d9702923965402.description: See what's new in EMIS Global.

ncl:eb4a2f723dafc701.title: News: Support groups available for COPD or asthma patients and their carers
ncl:eb4a2f723dafc701.description: Practices are encouraged to signpost patients and their carers to education and peer support following a diagnosis of COPD or asthma. Asthma + Lung UK provides free online, phone and face-to-face support services.

ncl:bd123cba3badc569.title: News: Talking Therapy service for autistic adults in Barnet ends on 30 June
ncl:bd123cba3badc569.description: The Talking Therapy for Autistic Adults in Barnet pilot service will come to an end on Tuesday 30 June. Referrals to the service will no longer be accepted and recent referrals will be informed of the closure.

ncl:a0ba5510aed269fb.title: News: RFL Introduces measles polymerase chain reaction testing via TQuest
ncl:a0ba5510aed269fb.description: GP s can request measles PCR testing through TQuest, with results provided via the Health Services Laboratories keystone system.

ncl:c404e0c0d96b1476.title: News: UKHSA and NHS England issue prescribing guidance for individuals returning from Southeast England
ncl:c404e0c0d96b1476.description: Prescribers are advised to offer antibiotic prophylaxis for returning individuals linked to the invasive meningococcal disease outbreak.

ncl:351aa3ec33f89eac.title: News: Meningococcal disease outbreak: Guidance and resources for GP Practices
ncl:351aa3ec33f89eac.description: Meningococcal outbreak advice for GPs includes vaccines, prevention, and resources for patient guidance.

ncl:71a13d1acf2a40a6.title: Pathway: Heart Failure Diagnosis and Assessment in Adults
ncl:71a13d1acf2a40a6.description: Following a Prevention of Future Deaths notice to the ICB, this pathway has been updated to include two new referral options to Royal Free London with defined inclusion criteria for urgent assessment of patients with suspected heart failure.

ncl:e605de47557b768f.title: Event: NCL NHS Diabetes Prevention Programme Quarterly Webinar
ncl:e605de47557b768f.description: The session will cover the NDPP’s face‑to‑face and online pathways, key topics such as diet and physical activity, and how to refer eligible patients to the programme. 12.30pm on Tuesday 21 April.

ncl:39d5581fa8539449.title: News: UCLH update: Temporary decommissioning of bone density scanner
ncl:39d5581fa8539449.description: UCLH's bone density scanner will be temporarily decommissioned for replacement, with services resuming on Monday 27 April. Additional lists will continue to run to minimise diagnostic delays.

ncl:61d832028059487f.title: Event: Reducing Harm From Psychotropics in People with Learning Disabilities: Community of Practice
ncl:61d832028059487f.description: This event supports the NHS England Patient Safety Collaborative programme on reducing harm from psychotropic medicines used for behaviour that challenges in people with a learning disability. Starts at 12.30pm on Tuesday 28 April.

ncl:22306be09178dad8.title: News: NHS England publishes technical resources to support delivery of the 2026/27 GP Contract
ncl:22306be09178dad8.description: Technical resources to help GPs manage clinically urgent patients and use data systems effectively for the 2026/27 contract.

ncl:9394553b0302c29f.title: News: NHSE releases NHS App feature for EMIS practices across NCL
ncl:9394553b0302c29f.description: NHS England is seeking feedback to understand the impact of this change to support the national roll‑out. Share your views to help optimise the feature for both patients and practices.

ncl:28da2b076a7d095c.title: News: NHS England publishes technical resources to support delivery of 2026-27 GP contract
ncl:28da2b076a7d095c.description: NHSE Technical resources to help GPs manage clinically urgent patients and use data systems effectively for the 2026/27 contract.

ncl:6d9918c0021a6e86.title: News: NHS England releases NHS App feature for EMIS practices across NCL
ncl:6d9918c0021a6e86.description: NHS England is seeking feedback to understand the impact of this change to support the national roll‑out. Share your views to help optimise the feature for both patients and practices.

ncl:f3e8b4c16da7c6f4.title: News: EMIS Global update: 16-20 March 2026
ncl:f3e8b4c16da7c6f4.description: See what's new in EMIS Global

ncl:0e669914f4ea3b05.title: News: WH CEO delivers message to primary care colleagues
ncl:0e669914f4ea3b05.description: The recently appointed Chief Executive of Whittington Health, Selina Douglas, has written an introductory message to GPs and primary care colleagues in Haringey, Islington and across north central London.

ncl:9e1284a5afdb08c9.title: Pathway: Chronic Kidney Disease
ncl:9e1284a5afdb08c9.description: The NCL CKD pathway has been updated to include key updates and NICE guidance. This includes streamlining prescribing guidance for SGLT2 inhibitors. The changes have been approved by the NCL CKD Network, Medicines & GPPA CRG and NCL CAG.

ncl:72292bc13b5075c8.title: News: Update on the formation of NHS West and North London on 1 April
ncl:72292bc13b5075c8.description: A message from Sarah McIlwaine, Director of Primary Care, NHS North Central London Integrated Care Board.

nhs:fbb5f2b2e07af331.title: Record GP access figures
nhs:fbb5f2b2e07af331.description: Dr Amanda Doyle, National Director for Primary Care and Community Services at NHS England, said: “GP teams are working harder than ever, delivering more than 1.5 million appointments for patients every working day over the last year – the highest number on record. “In part, this is due to practices now offering patients the choice […]

ncl:8d4202d1d6ba65a6.title: News: GP Webinar summary: 26 March 2026
ncl:8d4202d1d6ba65a6.description: Find a summary of recent meetings at any time by putting 'GP webinar' into the NCL General Practice Website's search bar.

ncl:9513a5328794ac1a.title: News: RFL update: Death notifications to be emailed to practice from 1 April
ncl:9513a5328794ac1a.description: From 1 April, death notifications from the Royal Free and Barnet Hospital will be emailed to practices with NHS.net addresses. Practices without an NHS email account will continue to receive letters by post.

ncl:6aaf00052e4db2cf.title: News: Eating and Passover: A guide for professionals
ncl:6aaf00052e4db2cf.description: View the professionals guide to supporting patients with eating disorders over the Jewish holiday of Passover.
